mapper.select: SELECT s.selection_id AS selectionId, s.topic_id AS topicId, t.topic_title AS topicTitle, t.topic_category AS topicCategory, CASE t.topic_category WHEN 1 THEN '高职升本' WHEN 2 THEN '3+1' WHEN 3 THEN '实验班' ELSE '未知' END AS topicCategoryDesc, e.enterprise_name AS enterpriseName, t.guidance_direction AS guidanceDirection, u.real_name AS creatorName, s.selection_reason AS selectionReason, s.selection_status AS selectionStatus, CASE s.selection_status WHEN 0 THEN '待确认' WHEN 1 THEN '中选' WHEN 2 THEN '落选' ELSE '未知' END AS selectionStatusDesc, DATE_FORMAT(s.apply_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS applyTime, DATE_FORMAT(s.confirm_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS confirmTime FROM topic_selection s INNER JOIN topic_info t ON s.topic_id = t.topic_id LEFT JOIN enterprise_info e ON t.enterprise_id = e.enterprise_id LEFT JOIN user_info u ON t.creator_id = u.user_id WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY s.apply_time DESC

SELECT t.topic_id AS topicId, t.topic_title AS topicTitle, t.topic_category AS topicCategory, CASE t.topic_category WHEN 1 THEN '高职升本' WHEN 2 THEN '3+1' WHEN 3 THEN '实验班' ELSE '未知' END AS topicCategoryDesc, t.topic_source AS topicSource, CASE t.topic_source WHEN 1 THEN '校内' WHEN 2 THEN '校外(协同开发)' ELSE '未知' END AS topicSourceDesc, t.creator_id AS creatorId, u.real_name AS creatorName, t.guidance_direction AS guidanceDirection, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.selection_status IN (0, 1) AND s.deleted = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS totalApplicants, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.selection_status = 1 AND s.deleted = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS confirmedCount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.selection_status = 0 AND s.deleted = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS pendingCount, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN s.selection_status = 2 AND s.deleted = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS rejectedCount FROM topic_info t LEFT JOIN user_info u ON t.creator_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN topic_selection s ON t.topic_id = s.topic_id WHERE t.deleted = 0 AND t.review_status = 6 AND t.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} GROUP BY t.topic_id, t.topic_title, t.topic_category, t.topic_source, t.creator_id, u.real_name, t.guidance_direction ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT u.user_id AS userId, u.real_name AS realName, u.student_no AS studentNo, u.user_phone AS userPhone, u.user_email AS userEmail, u.department AS department FROM user_info u INNER JOIN user_role ur ON u.user_id = ur.user_id INNER JOIN role_info r ON ur.role_id = r.role_id AND r.role_code = 'STUDENT' AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.deleted = 0 AND u.user_status = 1 AND u.department = ( SELECT ei.enterprise_name FROM enterprise_info ei WHERE ei.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId} LIMIT 1 ) AND u.user_id NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT s.student_id FROM topic_selection s WHERE s.deleted = 0 AND s.selection_status IN (0, 1) ) ORDER BY u.real_name
